user.title: Ozon Package Tracker
user.description: Track Ozon marketplace packages via tracking.ozon.ru. Packages are added later with the ozon_package_tracker.add_tracking service or from the bundled Lovelace card.

abort.single_instance_allowed: Already configured. Only a single instance is allowed.

data_description.source: track365 (recommended): query track365.ru — works out of the box, no proxy or anti-bot. Ozon: query tracking.ozon.ru directly (needs the headless-browser proxy or a cookie because of the anti-bot).
data_description.verify_ssl: Turn off only if requests fail with 'certificate has expired' (track365 sometimes lets its TLS certificate lapse). Off = do not verify the certificate.
data_description.proxy_url: Only used with source Ozon: URL of the companion ozon-tracker-proxy service, e.g. http://homeassistant.local:8080.
data_description.cookie: Only used with source Ozon (last resort): the 'cookie' request header from a browser that opened tracking.ozon.ru.

remove_tracking.name: Remove tracking
remove_tracking.description: Stop tracking a package by tracking number or by entity.

refresh.name: Refresh
refresh.description: Refresh tracking data for all packages now.
